subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath turned unto God and hath severed himself from all else. Verily, he is of them that have attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی الله و انقطع عما سواه الا انه ممن فاز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @presence of; reunion with God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation
